title: Anthropic rents SpaceX?
summary: Anthropic partnered with SpaceX to access Colossus, a major GPU cluster, addressing a critical weakness in vertical integration compared to competitors. The video argues that control over chips, energy, and datacenter infrastructure, rather than just model benchmarks, has become the determining factor in the AI race.
